title: poa ensiformis
intro: Poa ensiformis, also known as the Blue Grass, is a species of grass native to Australia and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa ensiformis include soothing digestive issues, relieving coughs and colds, and reducing inflammation. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
